title: Definitions
doc_html:
§2172.  Definitions

As used in this Chapter, "stalking" means any act that would constitute the crime of stalking under R.S. 14:40.2 or cyberstalking under R.S. 14:40.3.

Acts 2014, No. 355, §2.
